title: EccKey::flush is pub(crate) but Drop is the only caller
description: What is awkward: flush is pub(crate) implying internal callers might call it directly, but grep confirms Drop is the sole caller. pub(crate) invites future callers to manually flush without understanding that Drop already handles it, risking double-flush. Suggested rewrite: change 'pub(crate) fn flush' to 'fn flush' (private). If a caller ever needs early flush, they should drop the key explicitly with std::mem::drop(key).
